message:
feat(python): numpy.linalg.slogdet wrapper parity (franken_numpy-yxli)

Add fnp_python.slogdet(a) as a passthrough delegator to
np.linalg.slogdet so the SlogdetResult namedtuple identity and
batched (..., M, M) broadcasting semantics match numpy exactly
across real and complex inputs.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test with five scenarios: real 2x2
positive determinant (sign=1), real 2x2 negative determinant
(sign=-1), singular real 2x2 (sign=0, logabsdet=-inf), batched
stack of three 2x2 real matrices, and a complex128 2x2. Each
uses the `.sign` / `.logabsdet` attribute access path to confirm
the returned object is a genuine SlogdetResult namedtuple, not
a plain tuple.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
